# Template: Team Lead Completion Summary

**Agent:** team-lead
**Creates:** `final.md`
**Location:** `.github/work/current/<feature-name>/final.md`

---

```markdown
# Completion Summary: <Feature/Bug Name>

## Overview

**Status:** Complete
**Completed:** <date>
**Duration:** <time from plan creation to completion>

## What Was Delivered

<Brief summary of what was accomplished>

## Acceptance Criteria Verification

- [x] <criterion> - Verified by: <how it was verified>
- [x] <criterion> - Verified by: <how it was verified>
- [x] <criterion> - Verified by: <how it was verified>

| Task | Agent | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| <task> | @<agent-name> | Complete |
| <task> | @<agent-name> | Complete |
| <task> | @<agent-name> | Complete |

## Key Decisions

### <Decision Title>

**Context:** <situation that required a decision>
**Decision:** <what was decided>
**Rationale:** <why this approach was chosen>

## Deviations from Plan

| Original Plan | Actual | Reason |
|---------------|--------|--------|
| <planned approach> | <actual approach> | <justification> |

## Issues Closed

- <issue link or reference>
- <issue link or reference>

## Follow-up Items

<Any items identified for future work, if applicable>

- [ ] <follow-up item>
- [ ] <follow-up item>

<What went well, what could be improved for next time>

## Final Notes

<Any additional context for future reference>
```
